title: Podman Windows build (including cross build) instructions
body:
### Feature request description

There are build instructions for macOS https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/build_osx.md But nothing is provided for Windows platform. Recently I contributed fixes for the build scripts to make them compatible with msys2, so, that the full Windows package could be built using Windows machine only. 

### Suggest potential solution

Add build_windows.md documentation file.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

Add full CI workflow to validate that the build has not become broken after recent changes. But this seems to overkill, because CI is expensive and making this mandatory might actually slow down the team, which, for obvious reasons, is using Linux.

### Additional context

[Github workflow](https://github.com/arixmkii/qcw/blob/main/.github/workflows/prepare-podman.yml), which I'm using to create Windows builds with QEMU backend support. This could be used as a starting point for documentation.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Yes. If this is in general acceptable, then sure.
